rationale: Evergreen CI tests timing out on Windows; CI infrastructure issue, no spec behavior involved.
Intermittent S3 artifact download failures in Evergreen; CI infrastructure issue, no spec behavior.
BSON.pm test failures on 32-bit Perls; platform compatibility bug, not a spec rule violation.
delete_many not flagged as non-retryable per retryable writes spec; driver incorrectly allowed retry on non-retryable bulk op.
Sessions spec requires clearing session pool without endSessions after fork; driver failed to do this.
BSON::XS test failures on s390x due to endianness; platform portability bug, not spec nonconformance.
BSON::Timestamp test failures with BSON::XS on Win32; platform portability bug, not spec nonconformance.
Adding BSON::Raw support to insert/update; API improvement, no spec rule cited or contradicted.
Deprecating parallelCollectionScan helpers per DRIVERS-562; proactive spec-rollout improvement, not a bug.
Adding get_first_key method to BSON::Raw; API feature addition with no spec rule cited.
Removing Try::Tiny dependency for performance; internal refactor with no spec behavior change.
Spec change requires only sending bypassDocumentValidation when true; driver sent it unconditionally, contradicting spec.
Resync spec test files to add new read concern levels per DRIVERS-567; test infrastructure update.
Implementing spec change to ping idle sockets per socketCheckIntervalMS; driver lacked required spec behavior.
Broken Pod documentation link; documentation bug with no spec behavior involved.
BSON 1.8.1 compile failure on bleadperl with -Duselongdouble; platform compatibility issue, not spec.
Implementing spec-required custom server selector option per DRIVERS-486/SPEC-897; driver lacked required feature.
BSON spec requires specific error message format with field names and hex types; driver produced non-conforming errors.
BSON::XS error messages non-conforming per DRIVERS-281 spec requirement; cloned fix from PERL-606.
BSON depth counter thrown off by BSON::Raw; internal implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Bulk write result method called on non-object error; internal error handling bug, no spec rule violated.
Typo in Crypt::URandom usage; internal code bug with no spec behavior involved.
URI parsing failed for mongodb+srv with ssl=true option; driver incorrectly rejected valid spec-defined URI format.
Add tests for deleteMany/updateMany with retryWrites=true per DRIVERS-574; test infrastructure improvement.
Documentation update requiring mention of estimatedDocumentCount alongside countDocuments; docs change only.
ChangeStream spec's resumable error definition too broad; root cause in spec, fixed via DRIVERS-650 spec amendment.
Adding MongoDB 4.2 to Evergreen CI test matrix; CI infrastructure improvement, no spec behavior.
Sessions spec requires discarding server sessions on network errors per DRIVERS-649; driver failed to do this.
Transactions spec requires specifying effect of client-side errors per DRIVERS-672/SPEC-1195; driver lacked required behavior.
Add spec test that reads ignore db/collection readConcern in transactions per DRIVERS-576; test infrastructure addition.
Perl-specific Time::HiRes time function overriding built-in; internal implementation bug with float vs int type mismatch.
SRV URI parsing double-processes boolean options, rejecting valid 'ssl=true'; contradicts URI parsing spec requirement.
BulkWrite inserted array contains wrong _id values when partial DuplicateKeyError occurs; result spec violated.
BSON::XS compile error on Fedora due to gettid() symbol conflict; build/platform compatibility issue.
URI sanitization regex improvement; internal security/correctness fix, no spec rule contradicted.
TLS URI options parsed but not wired to MongoClient; spec-defined connection string options had no effect.
BulkWriteView missing pipeline support for update operations added in DRIVERS-626; driver lacked required spec behavior.
Memory leak in BSON::XS C code for nested documents; implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Removing enforced batch size of zero for enumeration commands; implementation improvement, command spec explicitly silent on this.
Incorrect comparison of php_mongocursor_is_valid() result to FAILURE constant; internal C code bug, no spec rule.
Cursor fails if first batch is empty due to enforced batch size of zero; self-inflicted bug from PHP-1356 fix area.
Segfault in log_response_header callback for command cursors without queries; internal crash, no spec rule violated.
PHP-specific array vs object distinction for cursor option; internal PHP type handling, no spec conformance issue.
Error handling order bug in php_mongo_runcommand; internal C code ordering bug, no specific spec rule cited.
aggregateCursor() with $out should force primary read preference per spec; driver failed to enforce this.
aggregate() with var args doesn't restore read pref after forcing primary for $out; internal state management bug.
primaryPreferred should be overridden to primary for $out pipelines; driver failed to enforce required primary selection.
Tag sets not cleared when forcing primary read pref for $out aggregate; primary not selected if tags don't match.
Missing null terminator after gethostname() buffer write; C safety bug, no spec behavior involved.
Missing get/setReadPreference() on MongoCommandCursor; API completeness bug in legacy PHP driver, no spec rule cited.
